name: open_impl_design
full_help:
open_impl_design

Description: 
Open an implementation design

Syntax: 
open_impl_design  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<run>]

Returns: 
design object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<run>]     Run to open

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
